title: pyrus malus var. astracanica
intro: Pyrus malus var. astracanica, also known as the Astracan apple tree, is a variety of apple tree native to Central Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its fruit, which has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and fever. The health benefits of Pyrus malus var. astracanica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include juice, tea, and dried fruit, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
